tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Most tests (test_numeric_cookie_names_handled_safely, test_deduplication_uses_native_tracking, test_sufficient_implementation_complexity, test_two_property_insertions) are pure text/regex analysis of the source file with no execution. test_compile_cookie_map_api_usage does run a compiler but on a mock program, not the actual code, and explicitly doesn't fail if compilation fails. These are essentially 'assert pattern in source' tests.

test_not_tautological.reason: A stub implementation that simply contains the right textual patterns (e.g., comments or dead code containing 'putDirectMayBeIndex', 'HashSet<String> seenKeys', 'seenKeys.add(...).isNewEntry') would pass all the regex-based tests without actually fixing the bug. The tests never execute the toJSON method or verify runtime behavior.

behavior_in_tests.reason: instruction.md says 'toJSON() must complete without crashing regardless of cookie name format, and must return a valid JSON object containing all cookie name-value pairs.' No test actually verifies that toJSON() runs without crashing or returns correct output — all tests are static source analysis.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are well-structured with clear section comments (BEHAVIORAL TESTS, FAIL-TO-PASS TESTS), descriptive function names, and docstrings explaining what each test verifies.

structured_data_schema.reason: The task involves fixing a C++ method; it does not produce structured data like JSON/CSV/API/DB output as a deliverable.

no_typos.reason: No obvious typos in filenames, paths, commands, or variable names in the instruction or test files.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: instruction.md explicitly names the exact files (CookieMap.cpp, CookieMap.h), specifies the exact method (toJSON), describes exact implementation patterns (putDirectMayBeIndex-style safe methods, HashSet with .add()/.isNewEntry), and even specifies the minimum line count (8 non-blank lines). This goes far beyond describing what's broken.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: This is a code-only task, not an agentmd-edits/config task.
